title: Wrong constraint in error message when delete prohibited due to foreign key
poc:
CREATE TABLE "test"."tbl2" (
         "id"            int             NOT NULL,
         "fk"            int             NOT NULL,
         CONSTRAINT "c2" PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
         CONSTRAINT "c3" FOREIGN KEY ("fk") REFERENCES "test"."tbl1" ("id")
 )
 ;
key_bug_features: Deleting from parent table with existing foreign key reference
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "test"."parent_table" ("id" int NOT NULL, "name" varchar(255), CONSTRAINT "pk_parent" PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE "test"."child_table" ("id" int NOT NULL, "parent_id" int NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "pk_child" PRIMARY KEY ("id"), CONSTRAINT "fk_parent" FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES "test"."parent_table" ("id"));
